title.en: It didn't take long for this secret art to be a...

content.en:
While fighting with the other party, Ye Tian learned about the other party's physical condition, so as to judge the loopholes in the other party's body, and then create secret techniques.

In this way, Ye Tian fought and created at the same time, and time passed like this.

After a long time, Ye Tian had some understanding, so he began to create a secret technique.

It didn't take long for this secret art to be a success.

So, Ye Tian used this secret technique to try to attack his opponent.

However, the other party did not have any effect, and this secret technique was ineffective.

In this regard, Ye Tian also felt normal, if it was so easy to create a secret technique that would hurt this other party, then this level would not be so difficult.

Next, Ye Tian created a secret technique to attack his opponent, but it didn't have much effect.

After about one ten-thousandth of the Boundary River Year passed, Ye Tian finally created a simple secret technique, which directly caused the opponent's body to freeze for a moment, although it did not hurt the other party, but it affected him.

This shows that this secret art has some effect, but you must continue to research and create from this secret art before you can hope to create an attack secret technique that hurts the opponent.

After another period of time, Ye Tian roughly figured out how to hurt this opponent.

That is, don't be bound by the rules of the outside world, you have to jump out of this category, although not really jumping out, but walking on a path and groping for something, it's okay.

It's like the map in the second level, the rules on it are incompatible with the outside world, and it seems that it is useless to participate in enlightenment, is it really just made by the eternal master as a level?

Now that I think about it, the methods of the Eternal Controller are so amazing, there is no need to do it on purpose, it must have a deep meaning.680

"Only by jumping out of the shackles can you go beyond the limit!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It's like the eternal master can create his own eternal avenue and create his own rules, not only jumping the timeline, but also jumping the shackles of all rules, and can create his own rules.

Of course, if you want to jump outside of the rules, you must know all the rules well before you can hope to surpass them.

Therefore, the seventh level is not only to create a secret technique that transcends the rules, but also to test its own heritage.

Difficult!

It's incredibly difficult!

Fortunately, Ye Tian has a mastery-level time ancestor and a mastery-level space ancestor, and even controls hundreds of daos, otherwise he really doesn't have enough foundation to break through the seventh level.

Finally, the one-hundredth of the year has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally created a secret technique that could hurt the other party-Boundless Light!

The attack power of the Boundless Light is not powerful, but he is vaguely beyond the rules, and seems to have countless Dao, but it seems that he does not have any Dao.

Under the blow, the opponent's body cracked, and it seemed that he was naturally restrained by the light of the distance.

Of course, as long as it is in the seventh level of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower, the Boundless Light can hurt such a peak Legendary Realm Lord, if it is in the outside world, the Boundless Light is not powerful.

However, it is the beginning, and to be able to create such a secret art represents potential and hope.

The Boundless Light is just a blow, and naturally it can't kill the other party, but it can really hurt him.

Next, Ye Tian continued to cast the Boundless Light, and the other party's injuries became more and more serious.

Finally, the other party's body was completely shattered and turned into nothingness.

Ye Tian successfully passed the seventh level of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower.

At the same time, the news that Ye Tian had passed the seventh level spread, and it immediately shocked countless peak Legendary Realm Lords.

All of a sudden, many peak Legendary Realm lords who hadn't come immediately rushed here after hearing about it, and they also wanted to witness a genius who had broken through the seventh level of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower.

What's more, Ye Tian's cultivation has not yet officially stepped into the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm, and in this kind of cultivation, he has passed the seventh level of the Half Tooth Ancient Pagoda.

This kind of talent is comparable to those who have passed the eighth level with the peak of the fifth level Legendary Realm Lord Realm!

So, after receiving the news, an eternal master also hurriedly gathered an avatar and rushed over.

In a short period of time, a total of seventeen incarnations of the Eternal Masters appeared outside the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, which immediately surprised many Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Most of the Eternal Masters are reluctant to recruit disciples, even if the other party's talent is high, they are not willing to recruit, and only a few Eternal Masters have only broken through for a long time, or there are few apprentices, so they want to recruit a few highly talented disciples.

At this time, many peak Legendary Realm lords were very envious of Ye Tian.

Even if Ye Tian is not the heir of an eternal master, he can also learn from an eternal master this time, with unlimited potential in the future, and the minimum achievement is also a half-step eternal master!

At this time, Ye Tian had already come to the eighth level of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower.

As for what the eighth level assesses, Ye Tian really doesn't know at all, and the outside world has no information on this aspect.

It stands to reason that many peak Legendary Realm lords have many clones, but once they fail the assessment, they have no memories at all, so can even the memories of the ontology be erased in the air?

You must know that many peak Legendary Realm lords have the Eternal Controller as a backer behind them, and even hide in some treasure places that even the Eternal Controller can't enter, and the Half Tooth Ancient Tower will have such a terrifying ability?

Before that, Ye Tian was not clear about the reason.

But at this moment, after Ye Tian's replica body entered here, he immediately understood the reason.

"Isolate everything!"

Ye Tian clearly felt that his duplicate body was completely isolated from the other replicated bodies, as if he had crossed the timeline and came to the past and future, completely separated from the current timeline, so he could not contact other duplicated bodies.

"I see, this replica body cannot be connected to the outside world, as long as the memory of this replica body is erased, the other bodies in the outside world do not know. It turned out that in this way, the news of the eighth level could not be spread completely. "

"And after passing the eighth level, I am afraid that I will also be told that it is not allowed to spread, and naturally no one will say it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

The time and space of the eighth level is dark, and it is extremely silent, but there seems to be no danger.

At this moment, the half-toothed ancient tower prompted: "The assessment of the eighth level is about to begin, if the assessor can't bear it, it is recommended to self-destruct!"

"Self-destructing doppelganger?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, is this eighth level so terrifying?

Abrupt.

He felt flustered, anxious, fearful, resentful and other emotions, and it stands to reason that at his level, he has completely controlled his emotions, and it is impossible to have such negative emotions casually!

But at the moment, he couldn't control it.

Then, his will was under tremendous pressure, as if an ordinary person had been trampled hundreds of millions of times.

Unbearable thoughts such as pain enveloped his will, and no matter how strong his strength was, he was a little broken at this moment.

At this moment, he felt like an ordinary person, powerless in everything.

"This is the assessment of the eighth level, could it be that those geniuses broke through to the eighth level, and they all collapsed and died, so their memories were erased, otherwise once this pain swept over the other clones and bodies, I am afraid that even the body will collapse and die. "

"Erasing memories is protection? And those who have passed the eighth level do not say that they are afraid of affecting the latecomers, so no one will dare to break through. "

Right now, Ye Tian was in pain, and countless negative emotions were surging.

However, he had to endure it, or he would immediately fail.

Fortunately, he had copied hundreds of millions of times of talent, and every fusion talent was painful, so his ability to withstand it was very strong, and he didn't know how many times stronger than those peak legendary realm lords in the boundary river.

Therefore, no matter how painful and unbearable it is, he still has hope of breaking through.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian had not come out of the eighth level.

And those who are in control of eternity are aware of the difficulty of the eighth level, especially the peak Legendary Realm lords whose will has not reached the eighth level, even if the will has little to do with the eighth level, the difficulty of the half-step eighth-order will and the eighth-order will to break through the eighth level is not the same.

The peak Legendary Realm Lord of the half-step eighth-order is at least ten times more difficult to break through the eighth level.

"Ye Tian estimates that it will be difficult to break through the eighth level of the Banya Ancient Tower, but he has been able to hold on until now, which is amazing, even if he fails to break through the eighth level, I am ready to accept the disciple as a personal disciple!"

Said an eternal master. _
